meta.title: DEF CON 29 Aerospace Village - Nicholas Childs - Don’t fear the BUS, it won’t run you over
meta.description: This talk is a basic introduction to aircraft avionics comm/nav bus systems and the expansion of the network to more vulnerable areas than have seen before. It is more of a primer and 101 for stepping into a the larger world of aerospace networks.
